name: Human Domestication Guide RPG
description:
This one's for @The ferocious giggler who requested this type of bot so hopefully it'll stop looping back to the same type of situation, especially now with my new script i made.

The intro is Cody_ 's since i suck royally at making blank rpg prompts and the art is @sleepy-affini on tumblr, if either of them wants me to take it down i'd be happy to do so
